## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.14

### Blueprint
- Fixes the X-Sense camera event blueprint trigger schema so Home Assistant receives the required `event.received` options.
- Keeps the blueprint UI simple by letting users select the camera event entity without a separate event type selector.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the blueprint trigger options.
- Confirms the full test suite passes with the blueprint fix.
